description: §14.4/§18.7 E-TYPE-082 — non-fail construction: `let e = MyError.NotFound("a", "b")` supplies TWO arguments to a variant that declares ONE payload field (`id`). Arity is unchecked construction-wide, so the check lives at the variant-constructor site and fires here even though there is no `fail`. Incidental W-PROGRAM-001 ignored by superset matching.
rationale: §14.4: construction supplies exactly one positional argument per declared payload field, in declaration order; too many arguments SHALL be a compile error (E-TYPE-082).
